underlying_goal: Add a header to the realtime interpretation conversation show page displaying speaker info, languages, creation date, and duration when in saved mode
friction_detail: TypeScript checks failed initially due to test files and factories missing newly added fields, requiring multiple test file fixes.
brief_summary: User requested a header with speaker/language/date/duration info on the interpretation show page; Claude implemented it across backend serializers, frontend schemas, translations, components, and tests, then created a PR.
